mint.example: She added fresh mint to the drink.
mint.example_zh: 她在飲料裡加了新鮮薄荷。

missionary.example: The missionary helped build a school.
missionary.example_zh: 那位傳教士幫忙蓋了一所學校。

moan.example: He let out a moan of pain.
moan.example_zh: 他發出一聲痛苦的呻吟。

moan.example: She moaned about the cold weather.

mock.example: It is unkind to mock others.
We took a mock exam before the test.
mock.example_zh: 正式考試前我們做了一次模擬考。

mode.example: The phone is in silent mode.

modify.example: She modified the recipe to make it healthier.
modify.example_zh: 她修改了食譜讓它更健康。

molecule.example: A water molecule is very small.

monopoly.example: One company had a monopoly on the market.
monopoly.example_zh: 一家公司壟斷了整個市場。

morality.example: The story teaches a lesson about morality.
morality.example_zh: 這個故事教了關於道德的一課。

mortality.example: Good medicine lowers the mortality rate.
mortality.example_zh: 好的醫療能降低死亡率。

mortgage.example: They pay a mortgage on their house.

motive.example: The police looked for a motive for the crime.

mount.example: He mounted the picture on the wall.

mumble.example: He mumbled an answer too quietly.

municipal.example: The municipal library is free to use.

muscular.example: The athlete has a muscular body.

mustard.example: He put mustard on his hot dog.

myth.example: The book tells an ancient Greek myth.
myth.example_zh: 這本書講了一則古希臘神話。

naive.example: It was naive of him to trust a stranger.
naive.example_zh: 他輕信陌生人實在太天真了。

narrative.example: The film has a clear narrative.
narrative.example_zh: 這部電影有清楚的故事線。

nasty.example: He made a nasty comment about her.

negotiation.example_zh: 經過長時間談判，他們達成了共識。

neutral.example: The reporter stayed neutral in the debate.
neutral.example_zh: 記者在辯論中保持中立。

nominate.example: They nominated her for class leader.

nomination.example_zh: 她被提名沒讓任何人意外。

nominee.example: The nominee gave a short speech.
nominee.example_zh: 被提名人發表了簡短的談話。

nonprofit.example: She volunteers at a nonprofit group.
nonprofit.example_zh: 她在一個非營利團體當志工。

norm.example: Working from home has become the norm.

noticeable.example: There was a noticeable change in his grades.
noticeable.example_zh: 他的成績有了明顯的變化。

notify.example: Please notify us if you can't come.
notify.example_zh: 如果你不能來，請通知我們。

notion.example: She had no notion of how hard it would be.
notion.example_zh: 她完全沒料到會有多難。

nowhere.example: The lost dog was nowhere to be found.
nowhere.example_zh: 走失的狗到處都找不到。

nutrient.example_zh: 水果含有許多有用的養分。

nutrition.example: Good nutrition is important for growth.
nutrition.example_zh: 良好的營養對成長很重要。

obligation.example: We have an obligation to help others.
obligation.example_zh: 我們有幫助他人的義務。

obscure.example: The meaning of the poem is obscure.
obscure.example_zh: 這首詩的意思很晦澀難懂。

observer.example: A careful observer notices small details.
observer.example_zh: 細心的觀察者會注意到小細節。

odds.example: The odds of winning are very low.

offering.example: They placed an offering at the temple.

olive.example: She added olives to the salad.

operational.example: The new system is now operational.

opponent.example: He shook hands with his opponent.

opposition.example_zh: 這項計畫遭到強烈反對。

opt.example: She opted to take the train instead.

optimism.example: His optimism kept the team going.
optimism.example_zh: 他的樂觀讓團隊撐了下去。

optional.example: The dessert is optional, not required.
optional.example_zh: 甜點可以選擇要不要，不是必須的。

orchard.example: They picked apples in the orchard.

originality.example_zh: 她的藝術展現出極大的獨創性。

outfit.example: She wore a stylish outfit to the party.
outfit.example_zh: 她穿了一身時髦的裝扮去派對。

outlet.example: Sports are a healthy outlet for stress.
outlet.example_zh: 運動是抒解壓力的健康管道。

outlet.example: Plug the lamp into the outlet.

outsider.example: At first, she felt like an outsider.
outsider.example_zh: 一開始她覺得自己像個局外人。

overall.example_zh: 總的來說，這趟旅行很順利。

overtake.example: The fast car overtook the truck.

overturn.example: The strong wind overturned the boat.

overwhelm.example: The work began to overwhelm her.
overwhelm.example_zh: 工作開始讓她招架不住。
